---
name: Suggest an Action
about: Suggest a GitHub Action to add to the list
title: 'Add: [Action Name]'
labels: 'suggestion'
assignees: ''
---

## Action Details

**Repository URL:** <!-- e.g. https://github.com/owner/repo -->

**Category:** <!-- Which section does it belong to? -->

**Description:** <!-- One-line description of what the action does -->

## Why should it be included?

<!-- Explain why this action is useful and worth adding to an awesome list -->

## Checklist

- [ ] The repository is not already in the list
- [ ] The repository is actively maintained
- [ ] The repository has a meaningful number of stars
- [ ] The description is succinct and fits on one line
